mood.label: RISK-ON
mood.summary: Global markets are rallying strongly on hopes of a U.S.-Iran peace deal, which has sent oil prices lower and boosted risk appetite. The highly anticipated SpaceX IPO today is adding to the bullish sentiment.

indicesNarrative: U.S. index futures are pointing to a higher open, following a strong overnight session in Asia and Europe. The rally is driven by optimism about a potential U.S.-Iran peace deal, which has caused a sharp drop in oil prices and a corresponding fall in bond yields, creating a tailwind for equities.
technicalsNarrative: Technical data is currently unavailable. Traders should rely on price action and volume analysis for entry and risk management until full technical pictures are restored.
sectorsNarrative: Travel and leisure stocks are leading gains in Europe on the back of lower oil prices. Chip-related shares saw significant gains in Asian trading, suggesting a risk-on rotation back into technology and growth sectors.
industryNarrative: Semiconductors and airlines are showing notable strength. The potential for lower fuel costs is a direct tailwind for airlines, while the broader risk-on mood and AI narrative are reigniting interest in chipmakers.

traderLens.name: Minervini
traderLens.view: Market is showing signs of a potential Stage 2 continuation. Look for VCP setups in leading stocks.

traderLens.name: Ted Zhang
traderLens.view: Clear rotation into risk-on assets. Technology, especially semiconductors, and travel sectors are showing institutional interest.

traderLens.name: Clement Ang
traderLens.view: The market context has improved significantly overnight. This is an environment to look for A-grade setups.

traderLens.name: SRxTrades
traderLens.view: Wait for clean pivots and volume confirmation. Don't chase the gap-up open.

traderLens.name: Jeff
traderLens.view: The overnight news is a catalyst, but stick to your rules. Manage risk and honor stops.

traderLens.name: Qullamaggie
traderLens.view: Strong momentum coming into the market. Look for explosive breakouts on high volume.

traderLens.name: Composite
traderLens.view: The tape is bullish. Focus on leading sectors like tech (semis) and be ready to act on high-quality setups, but be mindful of potential volatility around the open.

alert: Major geopolitical catalyst overnight: U.S. President signals potential peace deal with Iran, easing tensions.

news.headline: Asian stocks gain on easing US-Iran tensions, SpaceX debut awaited
European stocks jump to two-week highs as Iran-U.S. peace hopes lift sentiment
U.S. futures rise after Trump calls off Iran strikes
SpaceX set for largest IPO in history
